chunked_content_if_chunking_was_enabled: Chunked content if chunking was enabled
document_input_canonical_param_for_file_: Document input (canonical param for file upload or URL)
extract_and_chunk_a_document_with_pulse_: Extract and chunk a document with Pulse OCR so it can be indexed for retrieval.
extract_text_from_documents_using_pulse_: Extract text from documents using Pulse OCR
extracted_figures_if_figure_extraction_w: Extracted figures if figure extraction was enabled
integrate_pulse_into_the_workflow_extrac: Integrate Pulse into the workflow. Extract text from PDF documents, images, and Office files via URL or upload.
number_of_pages_in_the_document: Number of pages in the document
run_a_pdf_image_or_office_file_through: Run a PDF, image, or Office file through Pulse OCR and return clean markdown.
structured_output_if_schema_was_provided: Structured output if schema was provided
use_pulse_ocr_output_to_pull_structured_: Use Pulse OCR output to pull structured fields like vendor, totals, or dates from a document.
